summary: Live-applied ADR 0296 from a dedicated latest-main worktree by provisioning artifact-cache-lv3 as VM 180 on 10.10.10.80, converging the private cache-plane runtime with a 50-image warm set, shifting docker-build-lv3 off its local artifact-cache containers and onto the dedicated cache endpoints, and recording both the governed wrapper gate and the successful direct scoped replay needed for exact-main integration.

verification.check: Focused artifact-cache regression slice on the dedicated worktree
verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest python -m pytest -q tests/test_artifact_cache_runtime_role.py tests/test_artifact_cache_playbook.py tests/test_common_docker_bridge_chains_helper.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_post_verify_tasks.py` returned `18 passed in 1.02s`, covering the dedicated VM playbook, the artifact-cache runtime state transitions, the Docker-publication helper path fix, and the Docker bridge verification helper.

`make syntax-check-artifact-cache-vm`, the `build-artifact-cache` scope syntax check, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh workstream-surfaces`, `make generate-ops-portal`, and `make generate-changelog-portal` all passed after the capacity-model, workflow-catalog, command-catalog, and execution-scope surfaces were updated for the dedicated cache VM.

`make configure-artifact-cache-vm env=production` succeeded on retry `r8`, finishing with final recap `artifact-cache-lv3 : ok=118 changed=9 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=7 rescued=0 ignored=0` and `proxmox_florin : ok=14 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=3 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

The governed wrapper path `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=build-artifact-cache env=production EXTRA_ARGS='-e bypass_promotion=true'` advanced through the repo-managed guard chain and then stopped only at the branch-local `check-canonical-truth` README gate; after repairing the helper-source path used by `docker_runtime` and `playbooks/tasks/docker-publication-assert.yml` for nested service playbooks, the direct scoped replay `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/ansible_scope_runner.py run --inventory inventory/hosts.yml --run-id ws0296buildcachelive2 --playbook playbooks/services/build-artifact-cache.yml --env production -- --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump -e bypass_promotion=true` succeeded with final recap `docker-build-lv3 : ok=123 changed=7 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=20 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

Fresh post-cutover verification confirmed VM `180` is running with the declared IP and MAC, `artifact-cache-lv3` serves all four cache ports locally, `/opt/artifact-cache/seed-plan.json` contains `50` repo-derived `seed_images`, Docker on the cache guest trusts `10.10.10.80:5001-5004`, `docker-build-lv3` now points its Docker mirrors and insecure registries at those dedicated endpoints, `docker buildx inspect lv3-cache --bootstrap` succeeds, and the old local `artifact-cache-*` containers are absent from the build guest.

notes: This receipt captures branch-local live-apply proof on top of repository version 0.177.101 and platform version 0.130.68 before the exact-main integration step.

The source commit records the last synchronized mainline ancestor for this worktree; the live replay also included the workstream-local implementation and evidence updates now preserved on the branch.

The governed wrapper path is intentionally part of the audit trail even though it stopped at `check-canonical-truth`, because this workstream intentionally avoided refreshing the top-level README on the branch before the protected main integration step.

Merge-to-main still needs to replay or reverify from the latest origin/main lineage, refresh the protected `README.md`, `VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and `build/platform-manifest.json` surfaces, and cut a canonical mainline receipt.

correction_loop.repair_action: Switched the Docker publication-assurance helper source from a playbook-dir-relative path to an inventory-dir-relative path in both the shared Docker role and the shared post-verify task so nested service playbooks under playbooks/services can install the helper correctly.
correction_loop.verification: Reran the focused pytest slice, the relevant syntax and repository validation checks, and the direct build-artifact-cache scoped replay successfully.
